project.name: Gestión comercial | Leads PMAX
project.notes:
## Track team to-dos with the Kanban method

### How will this benefit you?
By providing visual clarity on tasks and real-time progress tracking, this Kanban template enhances and simplifies your workflow.

### Who is this template for?
This template is designed to benefit a wide range of individuals, including project managers, team leaders, and product managers.
